sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n99025" key="sunagnoe/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συναγνοέω</orth>, <sense id="n99025.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">to be ignorant with</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">together</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2571.tlg001:13p.448M" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Hierocl.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">in CA</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">13p.448M.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
